name: contract_review
description: a contract-review workflow world with clause flags; actions draft, redline, approve, sign

card.description: a contract-review workflow world with clause flags; actions draft, redline, approve, sign

rules: A contract advances through phases blank -> drafted -> redlined -> approved -> signed.
'draft' creates a fresh draft (resetting flags, approval and signature) from any phase except 'signed'.
Drafting populates a fixed clause roster; risky clauses (liability, indemnity, termination) start flagged.
'redline' resolves exactly one open clause flag per pass and is only legal while drafted or redlined.
'approve' is only legal when the draft exists and no clause remains flagged (flags_open == 0).
'sign' is only legal once the contract has been approved.
Any action whose precondition is unmet is a no-op, leaving state unchanged.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name") if isinstance(action, dict) else action

    # Fixed clause roster for a fresh draft. True == flagged for review.
    roster = [
        ["liability", True],
        ["indemnity", True],
        ["termination", True],
        ["confidentiality", False],
        ["payment", False],
    ]

    phase = s.get("phase", "blank")
    clauses = dict(s.get("clauses", {}))

    if name == "draft":
        # Produce a fresh draft from any not-yet-signed phase; resets flags.
        if phase != "signed":
            clauses = {c: flag for c, flag in roster}
            s["clauses"] = clauses
            s["clauses_total"] = len(clauses)
            s["flags_open"] = sum(1 for f in clauses.values() if f)
            s["draft_version"] = int(s.get("draft_version", 0)) + 1
            s["redline_rounds"] = 0
            s["approved"] = False
            s["signed"] = False
            s["phase"] = "drafted"

    elif name == "redline":
        # Resolve the next open clause flag; one clause per redline pass.
        if phase in ("drafted", "redlined"):
            open_clauses = sorted(c for c in clauses if clauses[c])
            if open_clauses:
                clauses[open_clauses[0]] = False
                s["clauses"] = clauses
                s["flags_open"] = sum(1 for f in clauses.values() if f)
                s["redline_rounds"] = int(s.get("redline_rounds", 0)) + 1
                s["phase"] = "redlined"

    elif name == "approve":
        # Approval gate: every clause must be resolved (no open flags).
        if (phase in ("drafted", "redlined")
                and int(s.get("clauses_total", 0)) > 0
                and int(s.get("flags_open", 0)) == 0):
            s["approved"] = True
            s["phase"] = "approved"

    elif name == "sign":
        # Execution gate: only an approved contract may be signed.
        if phase == "approved" and s.get("approved"):
            s["signed"] = True
            s["phase"] = "signed"

    return s

emit.report: Contract review status: phase={phase}; {flags_open}/{clauses_total} clauses still flagged; approved={approved}; signed={signed}.
